intentSynonyms: make a new call in twilio
open a new call in twilio
description: Initiate a voice call. Requires a TwiML URL that returns instructions for the call.

to.description: Recipient phone number in E.164 format (e.g., +15551234567)

from.description: Caller Twilio phone number in E.164 format (e.g., +15559876543)

url.description: TwiML URL that returns voice instructions for the call

method.description: HTTP method for the TwiML URL (GET or POST)

status_callback.description: URL to receive call status webhooks

status_callback_method.description: HTTP method for the status callback URL (GET or POST)
